title: Campaign Monitor vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Campaign Monitor and AWeber. Learn pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your business best.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs AWeber: Complete Comparison for 2025
intro: Campaign Monitor and AWeber are two established email marketing platforms with different strengths and target audiences. Campaign Monitor excels at serving agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while AWeber focuses on simplicity for solopreneurs and bloggers. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your business needs and budget.
choose_a_if: You manage multiple brands or client accounts and need multi-brand management capabilities
You require advanced automation through a dedicated journey designer
Your business is willing to pay from day one for more robust enterprise features
choose_b_if: You're just starting out and want to test email marketing with a free plan
You run a blog and need RSS-to-email functionality
You value simplicity and ease of use over advanced features

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than AWeber?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Campaign Monitor is better for agencies and teams managing multiple brands with advanced automation requirements. AWeber is better for beginners and solopreneurs seeking simplicity and affordability. Campaign Monitor has stronger G2 reviews for features, while AWeber has better Trustpilot ratings for overall customer satisfaction.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or AWeber?
faq.a: AWeber is cheaper overall, offering a free tier with up to 500 subscribers and paid plans starting at $15/month. Campaign Monitor has no free tier and starts at $11/month, making it more expensive from the beginning. However, Campaign Monitor's pricing is competitive for agencies needing multi-brand capabilities.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contacts and use standard CSV formats for migration. Most email marketing tools, including Campaign Monitor, can import subscriber lists from AWeber. Plan for some downtime and test your automation sequences in the new platform before switching your campaigns live.
